summary: P0 Auth Flow Optimization Testing Complete - All features verified. Login/Signup pages load correctly with prefetch links. Email/password login works. Auth redirect guards redirect logged-in users from /login and /signup to /app. AuthCallback shows minimal UI with spinner and 'Signing you in' text. Code review confirms: requestAnimationFrame used instead of setTimeout for Google sign-in, 4s slow notice timer (not 6s), no BOOTSTRAP_MESSAGES.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All P0 Auth Flow Optimization features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Auth Flow Optimization fully tested. All auth pages working correctly. Prefetch links verified in document head. Auth redirect guards working. AuthCallback UI is minimal with no rotating messages.
